biz_retail_desc: Dukaan dhab ah, kiosk, spaza, duka ama boutique
biz_market_stall_desc: Sagxad suuq, iibiye waddo dhinaceed ah ama ganacsade waddo
biz_food_bev_desc: Makhaayad, kafateeriya, kiosk cunto ama sagxad cunto
biz_salon_desc: Saloon timo, xalaaqe ama adeegyo qurux
biz_courier_desc: Gaarsiiye, darawal gaarsiin ama boda boda
biz_ecommerce_desc: Ku iibi onlayn adigoo isticmaalaya Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop iwm.
biz_services_desc: Adeegyo xirfad, madax-bannaan ama dijitaal ah
biz_importer_desc: Soo deji oo dib u iibi alaab
biz_exporter_desc: Alaab si caalami ah u dhoofi
welcome_subtitle: Aan dejino profile-ka ganacsigaaga si AskBiz uu kuugu siiyo jawaabo ku salaysan xogtaada dhabta ah — hana ahayn talooyin guud.
business_subtitle: Tani waxay AskBiz caawisaa inuu isticmaalo luqadda saxda ah oo diirado waxa muhiimka u ah qaabka ganacsigaaga.
skip: Ka bood dejinta — si toos ah ugu gal AskBiz
location_subtitle: Tani waxay dejisaa lacagtaada iyo goobtaada si loogu isticmaalo qiimaynta, canshuurta, iyo aragtiyada suuqa.
sector_subtitle: Dooro dhammaan kuwa kula habboon. AskBiz wuxuu tan u isticmaalaa si uu kuugu raaciyo fursadaha suuqa dhoofinta, heerarka canshuurta, iyo warka tartanka ee ku haboon badeecooyinkaaga gaarka ah.
export_title: Ma alaab ayaad si caalami ah u iibisaa?
export_subtitle: AskBiz wuxuu mudnaanta siin doonaa qiimaynta suuqyada dhoofinta, ogaanshaha canshuuraha, iyo digniinaha khatarta lacagta ee suuqyada aad daneyso.
export_opt_yes: Haa — waan dhoofiyaa ama waan doonayaa
export_markets_prompt: Suuqyada aad bartilmaameedsanaysid? (Dooro dhammaan kuwa kula habboon)
connect_subtitle: AskBiz wuu caqli badnaadaa marka lala xidho xogtaada dhabta ah. Waxaad ku xidhi kartaa Shopify, Amazon, QuickBooks iyo kuwo kale — ama ka bood oo mar dambe soo geli faylka CSV.
connect_skip: Ka bood — waxaan soo geli doonaa CSV
done_subtitle: AskBiz waa diyaar. Wax kasta oo ku saabsan ganacsigaaga weydii — soo geli fayl, ku xidh isha xogta, ama bilow inaad wax qorto.
done_subtitle_pos: Ganacsigaaga waa la dejiyay. Xigga, ku dar waxaad iibiso oo bilow kaashkaaga.
helper_hint: Taabo qalabka codka si aad u maqasho tan — ama u ogolow qof inuu kaa caawiyo dejinta.
